meta.composition_note: Percentages are ideal formula mass percentages; real samples and ore bodies vary by deposit and assay.

sources.name: NIST atomic weights and isotopic compositions

meta.title: KnitWeb Chemistry + Mineral Enrichment Index

minerals.enrichment_note: High-silica feedstock candidate when low impurity quartz is required.
minerals.name: Quartz

minerals.enrichment_note: Major iron ore mineral with high ideal iron mass percentage.
minerals.name: Hematite

minerals.enrichment_note: Dense magnetic iron oxide useful for separations based on magnetic response.
minerals.name: Magnetite

minerals.enrichment_note: Hydrated iron phase; water/hydroxyl content lowers ideal iron percentage.
minerals.name: Goethite

minerals.enrichment_note: Titanium-bearing oxide commonly evaluated as a Ti feed mineral.
minerals.name: Ilmenite

minerals.enrichment_note: High titanium dioxide mineral and benchmark Ti enrichment candidate.
minerals.name: Rutile

minerals.enrichment_note: TiO2 polymorph with the same ideal mass composition as rutile.
minerals.name: Anatase

minerals.enrichment_note: Aluminum hydroxide phase in bauxite-style enrichment workflows.
minerals.name: Gibbsite

minerals.enrichment_note: Alumina mineral with high ideal aluminum percentage.
minerals.name: Corundum

minerals.enrichment_note: Calcium carbonate reference mineral for carbonate-rich material streams.
minerals.name: Calcite

minerals.enrichment_note: Calcium-magnesium carbonate useful when Mg/Ca balance matters.
minerals.name: Dolomite

minerals.enrichment_note: Hydrated sulfate; water strongly affects mass-balance interpretation.
minerals.name: Gypsum

minerals.enrichment_note: Sodium chloride reference for brines and evaporite separations.
minerals.name: Halite

minerals.enrichment_note: Potassium chloride mineral for potash-oriented streams.
minerals.name: Sylvite

minerals.enrichment_note: Calcium fluoride source mineral with strong halide signature.
minerals.name: Fluorite

minerals.enrichment_note: Phosphate mineral family seed for phosphorus and calcium ranking.
minerals.name: Fluorapatite

minerals.enrichment_note: Lithium aluminosilicate candidate for Li-bearing hard-rock workflows.
minerals.name: Spodumene

minerals.enrichment_note: Magnesium silicate reference for Mg/Si phase tracking.
minerals.name: Enstatite

minerals.enrichment_note: Sodium feldspar seed for aluminosilicate classification.
minerals.name: Albite

minerals.enrichment_note: Calcium feldspar reference in plagioclase-rich material.
minerals.name: Anorthite

minerals.enrichment_note: Potassium feldspar seed for K-bearing silicate ranking.
minerals.name: Orthoclase

minerals.enrichment_note: Clay mineral seed for hydrated aluminosilicate enrichment.
minerals.name: Kaolinite

minerals.enrichment_note: Mica seed linking potassium and aluminosilicate signatures.
minerals.name: Muscovite

minerals.enrichment_note: Approximate Mg/Fe mica seed; exact composition varies across the solid solution.
minerals.name: Biotite

minerals.enrichment_note: Copper iron sulfide candidate for Cu-bearing enrichment.
minerals.name: Chalcopyrite

minerals.enrichment_note: Iron sulfide reference; useful as a sulfide gangue/interference marker.
minerals.name: Pyrite

minerals.enrichment_note: Lead sulfide seed with very high ideal lead mass percentage.
minerals.name: Galena

minerals.enrichment_note: Zinc sulfide mineral for Zn-bearing material streams.
minerals.name: Sphalerite

minerals.enrichment_note: Approximate Fe-Ni sulfide seed for nickel enrichment ranking.
minerals.name: Pentlandite

minerals.enrichment_note: Cobalt arsenic sulfide seed for Co-bearing mineral search.
minerals.name: Cobaltite

minerals.enrichment_note: Approximate rare-earth phosphate seed; actual REE mix is deposit dependent.
minerals.name: Monazite

minerals.enrichment_note: Approximate light rare-earth carbonate-fluoride seed.
minerals.name: Bastnasite

minerals.enrichment_note: Zirconium silicate seed with silicon and zirconium isotope relevance.
minerals.name: Zircon

minerals.enrichment_note: High uranium oxide seed. Handle only as a data reference, not an operational guide.
minerals.name: Uraninite

minerals.enrichment_note: Tin oxide seed with high ideal tin mass percentage.
minerals.name: Cassiterite

minerals.enrichment_note: Chromium-bearing spinel seed for Cr enrichment ranking.
minerals.name: Chromite

minerals.enrichment_note: Lead chlorovanadate seed connecting vanadium and lead-rich signatures.
minerals.name: Vanadinite

minerals.enrichment_note: Hydrated potassium uranium vanadate seed linking U and V enrichment profiles.
minerals.name: Carnotite
